cases: reject mutable or malformed source identity
reject parsed path absent from independent discovery
verification.scope: isolated byte-identical local execution before GitHub commit

observed: The effective queue contract existed without an executable gate.
ACTIVE_QUEUE.json remains a canonical baseline rather than a complete current queue.
Append-only queue updates require complete discovery, immutable commit binding, and explicit precedence handling.
inferred: A fail-open merger can silently omit history or convert contradictory records into an apparently authoritative task selection.
proposed: Add repository-native corpus discovery and invoke this gate before autonomous queue selection.
superseded: Selecting work directly from ACTIVE_QUEUE.json alone.
Accepting caller-supplied update subsets without independent path discovery.
unresolved: The connector still does not provide complete directory enumeration for operations/queue-updates.
The gate is not yet wired into CI or every team runtime.
Blob-to-commit membership must be established by the future repository discovery wrapper.

falsification_route: Run the committed test file in a fresh checkout.
Provide incomplete discovery input and require EQG-004 rejection.
Provide conflicting same-timestamp versions and require emitted EQG-006 contradiction.
Wire repository discovery, then compare discovered path count against parsed update count at one immutable commit.
